detail.description:
SEASON 12 NOW LIVE!
Arena Breakout is a Next-Gen Immersive Tactical FPS, and a first-of-its-kind extraction looter shooter that pushes the limits of war simulation on Mobile. Choose a faction and engage in tactical team confrontation,complete special missions, and experience intense firefights in a wide variety of  maps and modes.

EXPLORE THE SWAMPY VALLEY
Explore the all-new Swampy Valley, an expanse 47% larger than before, providing boundless opportunities for exploration. Traverse the river
detail.recentChanges:
[Map Updates]
[New Map: Valley: New Order]
During the North-South Conflict, many of the Valley facilities once owned by the Antonio Family were left to decay. As Doss returned and gradually regained his footing, he started restoring these ruins... along with his family's glory.
